affects: every run's parallelism, determinism and provenance

runtime._measured: Capping the pools: 12.33 s -> 8.15 s at three workers (1.51x). Worker benchmark over eight tables: 63.90 s / 33.71 / 24.62 / 19.72 wall at jobs 1..4, core-seconds 63.88 / 65.73 / 65.96 / 67.88 — wall falls monotonically while core-seconds rise 6%, so four workers are Pareto-optimal.
runtime._reproducibility: Capping does not touch the arithmetic: stage 3 re-run on TDG reproduced [-0.09471459, -0.11062278, +0.04853174, +0.24495527] exactly.

cost_model_core_seconds_per_ticker._note: Measured before the runtime fix, at three workers with uncapped pools. Re-measure under the new configuration before budgeting a new panel.

run_manifest_required_fields.execution_head_sha: git HEAD at the moment the run started
run_manifest_required_fields.contract_sha256: sha256 of this file as read by the run
run_manifest_required_fields.code_dirty: whether the working tree carried uncommitted changes
run_manifest_required_fields.environment: python, platform, cpu count, thread pool settings and what the pools actually reported
run_manifest_required_fields.permutations_executed: per candidate, so an early stop is visible
